name: Cheddar Crackers
recipeIngredient: 2 Cups Extra Sharp Cheddar Cheese (finely grated)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dry ingredients in a bowl.
2. Cut in the butter until the mixture resembles cornmeal.
3. Blend in the finely grated cheddar cheese with a fork until well combined.
4. Add the remaining ingredients and shape into 1 1/2 to 2-inch rolls.
5. Chill for 30 to 40 minutes in the refrigerator.
6. Slice each roll into slices about 1/4-inch thick.
7. Bake on an ungreased cookie sheet at 400 degrees F for about 10 minutes.
8. Remove from the cookie sheet and let cool.
9. Store the cooled crackers in airtight containers in a cool place. They will keep for several weeks, or indefinitely if frozen.
